subcodes.title: Ziyarat-i-Jinab-i-Aba Badi'
subcodes.first_line: The days of joy and exultation have passed away, and the days of sorrow have come, for the Star of Certitude hath vanished from the heaven of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد مضت ایام الفرح و الابتهاج و اتت ایام الاحزان بما غاب نجم الایقان من سماء العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @visitation Tablets, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
